data.title: Refactor instruction files to use ticket tag/untag CLI
data.description: Refactor 8 call sites across 5 files: brainstorm/SKILL.md lines ~403 (interaction:deferred add), ~428 (interaction:deferred remove), ~782-793 (scrutiny:pending remove + brainstorm:complete add); roadmap/SKILL.md line ~256 (scrutiny:pending add); ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md lines ~239 (design:pending_review add) and ~246 (design:approved add); interaction-deferred-tag.md lines ~46+51 (canonical examples); preplanning/SKILL.md line ~978 (table row). After completion: zero grep hits for 'ticket edit.*--tags' outside migration script. Depends on Task 2 (bf27-2ba9) being complete.
